channel.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
External links

  • Awesome Sysadminstars11.9k - Curated list of amazingly awesome open source sysadmin resources.

    • Note-taking and Editors

  • Notes'n'Todosstars0 - Write notes and todos online in markdown with tag filtering and date sorting. (Demo) MIT Python

    • Polls and Events

    Booking and Scheduling

  • Calendso - The open-source online appointment scheduling system. (Demo, Source Codestars4k) MIT Nodejs

    • URL Shorteners

  • Link - A minimal, SQLite-backed URL shortener. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-3.0 Go

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    XMPP Servers

  • jackalstars938 - XMPP server with focus on stability, simple configuration and low resource consumption. Apache-2.0 Go

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    Recipe management

  • kcalstars6 - Track nutritional information about foods and recipes, set goals, and record a food journal to help along the way. Kcal is a personal system that focuses on direct control of inputs and a minimal, easy to use recipe presentation for preparing meals. (Demo) MPL-2.0 PHP

    • Automation

  • OliveTinstars136 - OliveTin is a web interface for running Linux shell commands. AGPL-3.0 Go

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Pastebins

  • pastystars27 - Pasty is a fast and lightweight code pasting server. (Demo) MIT Go

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

  • Ergo - Modern IRCv3 server written in Go, combining the features of an ircd, a services framework, and a bouncer. (Source Codestars1.3k) MIT Go

  • EspoCRM - CRM with a frontend designed as a single page application, and a REST API. (Demo, Source Codestars771) GPL-3.0 PHP

  • htmly - Databaseless Blogging Platform (Flat-File Blog). (Demo, Source Codestars696) GPL-2.0 PHP

    File transfer/synchronization

  • Z-Push - Implementation of Microsoft’s ActiveSync protocol. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Feed Readers

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • Zipline - A lightweight, fast and reliable file sharing server that is commonly used with ShareX, offering a react-based Web UI and fast API. (Source Codestars69) MIT Nodejs

    • Resource Planning

    Enterprise Resource Planning

  • ERPNext - Free open source ERP system. (Source Codestars8.3k) GPL-3.0 Python

    • URL Shorteners

  • liteshortstars50 - User-friendly, actually lightweight, and configurable URL shortener. (Demo) MIT Python

    • Automation

  • Leon - Open-source personal assistant who can live on your server. (Source Codestars7.5k) MIT Node.js

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Automation

  • ChiefOnboarding - Employee onboarding platform that allows you to provision user accounts and create sequences with todo items, resources, text/email/Slack messages, and more! Available as a web portal and Slack bot. (Source Codestars91) AGPL-3.0 Python
  • ydl_apistars18 - Simple youtube-dl REST API to launch downloads on a distant server. (Source Codestars18) Unlicense Python

    • Money, Budgeting and Management

  • EasyQuickImportstars5 ⚠ - A tool that helps you import transactions, invoices and bills into QuickBooks Desktop from Excel or CSV. MIT PHP

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    E-commerce

  • Aimeos - Ultra fast, Open Source e-commerce framework for building custom online shops, market places and complex B2B applications scaling to billions of items with Laravel. (Demo, Source Code) LGPL-3.0/MIT PHP

    • Games

  • MTA:SA ⚠ - Multi Theft Auto (MTA) is a software project that adds network play functionality to Rockstar North's Grand Theft Auto game series, in which this functionality is not originally found. (Source Codestars796) GPL-3.0 C++
  • The Battle for Wesnothstars3.2k - The Battle for Wesnoth is an Open Source, turn-based tactical strategy game with a high fantasy theme, featuring both singleplayer and online/hotseat multiplayer combat.
  • Zero-K - Open Source on Springrts engine. Zero-K is a traditional real time strategy game with a focus on player creativity through terrain manipulation, physics, and a large roster of unique units - all while being balanced to support competitive play. ZK sourcestars400

    • Personal Dashboards

  • Dashystars191 - Feature-rich homepage for your homelab, with easy YAML configuration. (Demo) MIT Nodejs/Docker

    • Pastebins

  • LogPastestars115 - Minimal pastebin web app that's easy to self-host and persists data to any S3-compatible backend. (Demo) MIT Go

    • Note-taking and Editors

  • Notea - Self-hosted note-taking app stored on S3-compatible storage. (Source Codestars945) MIT Nodejs

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted May 10th - May 16th, 2021
item.description:
Feed Readers

Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • linx-serverstars17 - Simple file sharing and pastebin with API, auto-expiry, deletion keys, and web seed support. (Demo) GPL-3.0 Go

    • Password Managers

  • Vaultwardenstars8.9k - Lightweight Bitwarden server API implementation written in Rust. GPL-3.0 Rust

    • Gateways and terminal sharing

  • ShellHub - ShellHub is a modern SSH server for remotely accessing linux devices via command line (using any SSH client) or web-based user interface, designed as an alternative to sshd. Think ShellHub as centralized SSH for the the edge and cloud computing. (Source Codestars698) Apache-2.0 Go/Other

    • Document Management

  • I, Librarian - I, Librarian can organize PDF papers and office documents. It provides a lot of extra features for students and research groups both in industry and academia. (Demo, Source Codestars37) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • Flextype - Flextype is an open-source Hybrid Content Management System with the freedom of a headless CMS and with the full functionality of a traditional CMS. (Demo, Source Codestars445) MIT PHP

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Apr 26th - May 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Feed Readers

Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • image-uploaderstars4 - A shareX compatible image uploader built for speed with a web interface and REST API. AGPL-3.0 Rust

    • Misc/Other

  • Orchest - A new kind of IDE for Data Science. (Demo, Source Codestars742) AGPL-3.0 Docker
  • Databunker - Network-based, self-hosted, GDPR compliant, secure database for personal data or PII. (Source Codestars750) MIT Go

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • SPIP - Publication system for the Internet aimed at collaborative work, multilingual environments, and simplicity of use for web authors. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Custom communication systems

  • Chaskiq - Full featured livechat, helpcenter and CRM as an alternative to Intercom & Drift, Crisp and others. (Source Codestars1.4k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Search Engines

    IDE/Tools

  • Lowdefy - Build internal tools, BI dashboards, admin panels, CRUD apps and workflows in minutes using YAML / JSON on an self-hosted, open-source platform. Connect to your data sources, host via Serverless, Netlify or Docker. (Source Codestars342) Apache-2.0 NodeJs

    • Photo and Video Galleries

  • HomeGallery - Self-hosted open-source web gallery to browse personal photos and videos featuring tagging, mobile-friendly, and AI powered image discovery. (Demo, Source Codestars6) MIT Node.js

    • Search Engines

  • Jinastars3.3k - Cloud-native neural search framework for any kind of data. MIT Python

    • Genealogy

  • Genea.app - Genea is a privacy by design and open source tool anyone can use to author or edit their family tree. Data is stored in the GEDCOM format and all processing is done in the browser. (Source Codestars3) MIT Javascript
  • GeneWeb - GeneWeb is an open source genealogy software written in OCaml. It comes with a Web interface and can be used off-line or as a Web service. (Demo, Source Codestars176) GPL-2.0 OCAML
  • webtrees - Webtrees is the web's leading on-line collaborative genealogy application. (Demo, Source Codestars546) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    SIP

  • Yeti-Switch - Transit class4 softswitch(SBC) with integrated billing and routing engine and REST API. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-2.0 C++/Ruby

    • Search Engines

    Localization

  • Localizer - Free self-hosted open-source crowd-translating service for your product. (Demo, Source Codestars24) MIT Nodejs/Docker

    • Automation

  • Baserow - Open source online database tool and Airtable alternative. Create your own database without technical experience. (Source Code) MIT Python/Nodejs

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Task management/To-do lists

  • Nullboardstars2k - Single-page minimalist kanban board; compact, highly readable and quick to use. BSD-2-Clause Javascript

    • Photo and Video Galleries

  • PiGallery 2 - A directory-first photo gallery website, with a rich UI, optimised for running on low resource servers. (Source Codestars514) MIT Docker/Nodejs

    • Internet Of Things (IoT)

  • openHAB - Vendor and technology agnostic open source software for home automation. (Source Codestars502) EPL-2.0 Java

    • Search Engines

    Project Management

  • RhodeCode - RhodeCode is an open source platform for software development teams. It unifies and simplifies repository management for Git, Subversion, and Mercurial. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python

    • Pastebins

  • SocksBinstars7 - Simple and fast terminal based pastebin, with optional code highlighting. No specific client required, all you need is netcat. GPL-3.0 Python
  • MokinTokenstars2 - Clientside encrypted pastebin using tweetnacl. Unlicense PHP

    • Note-taking and Editors

  • Markdown Editstars189 - Online markdown editor/viewer. MIT HTML5

    • Misc/Other

  • MalwareMultiScanstars228 - Self-hosted VirusTotal-like for scanning files with multiple antiviruses running in a Docker. MIT C#

    • Feed Readers

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • YouTransfer - YouTransfer is a simple but elegant self-hosted file transfer and sharing solution. (Source Codestars1.5k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs
  • goploaderstars209 - Easy file sharing with server-side encryption, curl/httpie/wget compliant. MIT Go
  • Coquelicot - Coquelicot is a “one-click” file sharing web application with a focus on protecting users’ privacy. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    E-commerce

  • Open Source POS - Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale system. ( Source Codestars2.2k) MIT PHP

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • b2evolution CMS - The most integrated CMS ever: b2evolution includes everything you need to build websites for publishing, sharing and interacting with your community. (Source Codestars146) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    SIP

  • Routr - A lightweight sip proxy, location server, and registrar for a reliable and scalable SIP infrastructure. (Source Codestars808) MIT JavaScript

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Complete solutions

  • Ptorxstars194 - Email privacy. Anonymously send and receive with alias forwarding. GPL-3.0 Node.js
  • DebOps - Your Debian-based data center in a box. A set of general-purpose Ansible roles that can be used to manage Debian or Ubuntu hosts. (Source Codestars767) GPL-3.0-only YAML/Ansible/Python

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Custom communication systems

  • Darkwire.iostars612 - End-to-end encrypted instant web chat. MIT Nodejs

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Social Networks and Forums

  • AsmBB - A fast, SQLite-powered forum engine written in ASM. (Source Code) EUPL-1.2 Assembly

    • Personal Dashboards

  • Smashing - Smashing, the spiritual successor to Dashing, is a Sinatra based framework that lets you build excellent dashboards. It looks especially great on TVs. (Source Codestars2.6k) MIT Ruby

    • Feed Readers

    Object storage/file servers

  • SFTPGostars2.5k - Flexible, fully featured and highly configurable SFTP server with optional FTP/S and WebDAV support. AGPL-3.0 Go

    • Search Engines

    API Management

  • form.io - A REST API building platform that utilizes a drag & drop form builder, and is application framework agnostic. Contains open source and enterprise version. (Demo, Source Code) MIT NodeJS

item.description:
Task management/To-do lists

item.description:
Search Engines

IDE/Tools

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Feed Readers

Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • Gokapistars105 - Lightweight server to share files, which expire after a set amount of downloads or days. Similar to the discontinued Firefox Send, with the difference that only the admin is allowed to upload files. GPL-3.0 Go

    • Note-taking and Editors

  • Joplin - Joplin is a note taking application with Markdown editor and encryption support for mobile and desktop platforms. Runs client-side and syncs through self hosted Nextcloud or similar. Consider it like open source alternative to Evernote. (Source Codestars23.1k) MIT Nodejs

    • Money, Budgeting and Management

  • Inventree - InvenTree is an open-source inventory management system which provides intuitive parts management and stock control. (Source Codestars313) MIT Python

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Media Streaming

Video Streaming

  • Kerberos.io - Kerberos.io is a video surveillance solution, which works with any camera and on every Linux based machine (Raspberry Pi, Docker, Kubernetes cluster). (Demo, Source Codestars77) MIT C++

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Complete solutions

  • emailwizstars627 - Luke Smith's bash script to completely automate the setup of a Postfix/Dovecot/SpamAssassin/OpenDKIM server on debian. GPL-3.0 Bash

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Automation

  • Actionsflowstars1.8k ⚠ - The free Zapier/IFTTT alternative for developers to automate your workflows based on Github actions. MIT Docker/Nodejs

    • Media Streaming

    Video Streaming

  • Oblectostars72 ⚠ - Media server for Movies and TV Shows with a responsive Vue.js frontend. It has robust transcoding support as well as federation capabilities to share your library with your friends. AGPL-3.0 Nodejs

    • Misc/Other

  • changedetection.iostars616 - Self-hosted tool for staying up-to-date with web-site content changes. Apache-2.0 Python/Docker
  • Kimai - Kimai is a free & open source timetracker. It tracks work time and prints out a summary of your activities on demand. (Demo, Source Codestars1.3k) MIT PHP

    • Feed Readers

    Web based file managers

  • FileGator - FileGator is a powerful multi-user file manager with a single page front-end. (Demo, Source Codestars656) MIT PHP

    • Pastebins

  • FlashPaperstars32 - A one-time encrypted zero-knowledge password/secret sharing application focused on simplicity and security. No database or complicated set-up required. (Demo) MIT PHP

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    CalDAV or CardDAV servers

  • Etebase (EteSync) - End-to-end encrypted and journaled personal information server supporting calendar and contact data, offering its own clients. (Source Codestars861) AGPL-3.0 Python/Django

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    E-commerce

  • Solidus - A free, open-source ecommerce platform that gives you complete control over your store. (Demo, Source Codestars3.7k) BSD-3-Clause Ruby

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    Recipe management

  • Mealie - Material design inspired recipe manager with category and tag management, shopping-lists, meal-planner, and site customizations. Mealie is focused on simple user interactions to keep the whole family using the app. (Source Codestars547) MIT Python

item.description:

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020

  • homebank-converterstars27 - Web app to convert an export bank file to compatible Homebank csv. (Demo) AGPL-3.0 HTML5
  • Sonarr - Automatic TV Shows downloader and manager for Usenet and BitTorrent. It can grab, sort and rename new episodes and automatically upgrade the quality of files already downloaded when a better quality format becomes available. (Source Codestars6.3k) GPL-3.0 C#

    • Blogging Platforms

  • Antville - Free, open source project aimed at the development of a high performance, feature rich weblog hosting software. (Source Codestars39) Apache-2.0 Javascript
  • Hexo - Fast, simple and powerful blog framework, powered by Node.js. (Source Codestars32.7k) MIT Nodejs
  • Hotglue - Freehand CMS which allows to construct websites directly in a web-browser. It uses flat files for storage and provides an intuitive GUI. (Demo, Source Codestars153) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Known - Single website for all your content. (Source Codestars878) Apache-2.0 PHP

    • Bookmarks and Link Sharing

  • unmarkstars1.5k - Open source to do app for links. MIT PHP

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    CalDAV or CardDAV web-based clients

  • InfCloud - Open source CalDAV/CardDAV web client implementation. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Javascript

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Custom communication systems

  • Cherrystars239 - Tiny webchat server. GPL-2.0 Go
  • Lets-Chat - Self hosted chat suite written in Node. (Source Codestars9.5k) MIT Nodejs
  • Synapse - Server for Matrix, an open standard for decentralized persistent communication. (Source Codestars7.8k) Apache-2.0 Python
    • Matrix Console Web - Web client meant to be a showcase of Matrix capabilities, and reference implementation of the Matrix standard. (Source Codestars25) Apache-2.0 Javascript
    • Element - Fully-featured Matrix client for Web, iOS & Android. (Source Codestars6.6k) Apache-2.0 Javascript
  • TextBeltstars2.2k ⚠ - Outgoing SMS API that uses carrier-specific gateways to deliver your text messages for free, and without ads. MIT Javascript

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Complete solutions

  • docker-mailserverstars7.1k - Fullstack but simple mail server (smtp, imap, antispam, antivirus, etc.). Only configuration files, no SQL database. Keep it simple and versioned. Easy to deploy and upgrade. MIT Docker

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Mail Transfer Agents

  • Haraka - High-performance, pluginable SMTP server written in Javascript. (Source Codestars3.9k) MIT Javascript

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Mailing lists and Newsletters

  • Dada Mail - Web-based list management system that can be used for announcement lists and/or discussion lists. (Source Codestars116) GPL-2.0 Perl
  • Mautic - Mautic is marketing automation software (email, social and more). (Source Codestars4.5k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Schleuder - GPG-enabled mailing list manager with resending-capabilities. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Ruby
  • Sympa - Mailing list manager. GPL-2.0 Perl

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Webmail clients

  • Cypht - Feed reader for your email accounts. (Source Codestars646) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • RainLoop - Simple, modern and fast webmail with IMAP/SMTP Support and multi accounting. (Demo, Source Codestars3.5k). AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    IRC

  • Weechat - Fast, light and extensible chat client. GPL-3.0 C
    • Glowing Bearstars840 - A web frontend for WeeChat. (Demo) GPL-3.0 JavaScript
  • ZNC - Advanced IRC bouncer. (Source Codestars1.8k) Apache-2.0 C++

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    SIP

  • Asterisk - Easy to use but advanced IP PBX system, VoIP gateway and conference server. GPL-2.0 C

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Social Networks and Forums

  • Abilian SBEstars48 - Open Source Collaboration and Social Networking framework and platform. LGPL-2.1 Python
  • Anahita - Open Source Social Networking Framework and Platform. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Bootcamp - Enterprise social network. (Source Codestars2.1k) MIT Python
  • Elgg - Powerful open source social networking engine. (Source Codestars1.5k) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • HumHub - Flexible kit for private social networks. (Source Codestars5.4k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Isso - Lightweight commenting server written in Python and Javascript. It aims to be a drop-in replacement for Disqus. (Source Codestars4.4k) MIT Python

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    XMPP Web Clients

  • Converse.js - Free and open-source XMPP chat client in your browser. (Source Codestars2.7k) MPL-2.0 Javascript
  • JSXC - Real-time XMPP web chat application with video calls, file transfer and encrypted communication. There are also versions for Nextcloud/Owncloud and SOGo. (Source Codestars616) MIT Javascript

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • Apostrophe - Node.js CMS with a focus on extensible in-context editing tools. (Demo, Source Codestars3.5k) MIT Nodejs
  • Concrete 5 CMS - Open source content management system. (Source Codestars661) MIT PHP
  • eLabFTW - Online lab notebook for research labs. Store experiments, use a database to find reagents or protocols, use trusted timestamping to legally timestamp an experiment, export as pdf or zip archive, share with collaborators…. (Demo, Source Codestars507) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • KeystoneJS - CMS and Web Application Platform. (Demo, Source Codestars3.9k) MIT Nodejs
  • Pagekit - New modern CMS to create and share. (Source Codestars5.4k) MIT PHP
  • Pico - Stupidly simple, blazing fast, flat file CMS. (Source Codestars3.4k) MIT PHP
  • REDAXO - Simple, flexible and useful content management system (documentation only available in German). (Source Codestars271) MIT PHP
  • Textpattern - Flexible, elegant and easy-to-use CMS. (Demo, Source Codestars606) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • TYPO3 - Powerful and advanced CMS with a large community. (Source Codestars773) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    E-commerce

  • Open Food Network - Online marketplace for local food. It enables a network of independent online food stores that connect farmers and food hubs with individuals and local businesses. (Source Codestars707) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

    • Feed Readers

  • Feedbin - Simple, fast and nice looking RSS reader. (Source Codestars2.8k) MIT Ruby
  • Selfoss - New multipurpose rss reader, live stream, mashup, aggregation web application. (Source Codestars2k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Stringerstars3.3k - Work-in-progress self-hosted, anti-social RSS reader. MIT Ruby
  • Tembozstars52 - Two-column feed reader emphasizing filtering capabilities to manage information overload. MIT Python

    • Feed Readers

    File transfer/synchronization

  • Nextcloud - Access and share your files, calendars, contacts, mail and more from any device, on your terms. (Demo, Source Codestars14.2k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Syncany - Secure file sync software for arbitrary storage backends, an open-source cloud storage and filesharing application. Securely synchronize your files to any kind of storage. GPL-3.0 Java

    • Feed Readers

    Peer-to-peer filesharing

  • bittorrent-tracker - Simple, robust, BitTorrent tracker (client and server) implementation. (Source Codestars1.2k) MIT Nodejs
  • cloud-torrentstars4.9k - Torrent Web Client with HTTP retrievable or streamable downloaded files. AGPL-3.0 Go
  • Transmission - Fast, easy, Free Bittorrent client. (Source Codestars5.5k) GPL-3.0 C

    • Feed Readers

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • BoZoNstars287 - Minimalist Drag and drop file sharing app. AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Plikstars684 - Plik is a scalable and friendly temporary file upload system. (Demo) MIT Go
  • Up1stars728 - Client-side Encrypted Image Host. MIT Nodejs

    • Feed Readers

    Web based file managers

  • ResourceSpace - ResourceSpace open source digital asset management software is the simple, fast, and free way to organise your digital assets. (Demo, Source Code) Other PHP

    • Games

  • A Dark Roomstars5.3k - Minimalist text adventure game for your browser. (Demo) MPL-2.0 HTML5

    • Media Streaming

    Audio Streaming

  • Ampache - Web based audio/video streaming application. (Demo, Source Codestars2.7k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Compactdstars76 - Remote music player that supports adding content. MIT Nodejs
  • FriendsRadiostars22 ⚠ - Share music with your friends from Youtube and Soundcloud. (Demo) MIT Nodejs
  • Groove Basinstars1.8k - Music player server with a web-based user interface inspired by Amarok 1.4. MIT Nodejs
  • koel - Personal music streaming server that works. (Source Codestars12.5k) MIT PHP

    • Misc/Other

  • DomainMOD - Application to manage your domains and other internet assets in a central location. DomainMOD includes a Data Warehouse framework that allows you to import your WHM/cPanel web server data so that you can view, export, and report on your data. (Demo, Source Codestars259) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • google-webfonts-helperstars8.1k ⚠ - Hassle-Free Way to Self-Host Google Fonts. Get eot, ttf, svg, woff and woff2 files + CSS snippets. (Demo) MIT Nodejs
  • Trello Burndownstars43 ⚠ - Easy to use SCRUM burndown chart for Trello boards. MIT Go/Docker

    • Money, Budgeting and Management

  • Dot Ledger - Web-based personal finance management tool. (Demo, Source Codestars202) Apache-2.0 Ruby
  • ExMoneystars153 - Self-hosted personal finance app. ISC Elixir
  • Invoice Ninja - Powerful tool to invoice clients online. (Demo, Source Codestars5.9k) AAL PHP

    • Note-taking and Editors

  • MiniNotestars176 - Simple Markdown note-taking app with persistence. MIT Nodejs
  • Standard Notes - Simple and private notes app. Protect your privacy while getting more done. That's Standard Notes. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-3.0 Ruby
  • Turtl - Totally private personal database and note taking app. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 CommonLisp

    • Office Suites

  • Infinoted - Server for Gobby, a multi-platform collaborative text editor. (Source Codestars508) MIT C++

    • Pastebins

  • pastebinstars75 - Simple pastebin service with convenient api and CLI. (Demo) MIT Go
  • Sup3rS3cretMes5agestars321 - Very simple (to deploy and to use) secret message service using Hashicorp Vault as a secrets storage. MIT Go

    • Personal Dashboards

  • Habitica - Habit tracker app which treats your goals like a Role Playing Game. Previously called HabitRPG. (Source Codestars8.3k) GPL-3.0/CC-BY-NC-SA-3.0/CC-BY-SA-3.0 Nodejs

    • Photo and Video Galleries

  • Chevereto Free - Powerful and fast image hosting script that allows you to create your very own full featured image hosting website in just minutes. (Source Codestars2k) AGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Mediagoblin - Free software media publishing platform that anyone can run. You can think of it as a decentralized alternative to Flickr, YouTube, SoundCloud, etc. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python
  • Photatostars132 - Self-hosted photo gallery, accessible through a responsive WebUI. Directly uses and indexes a specific folder in the filesystem. AGPL-3.0 Java

    • Polls and Events

  • Fider - Open source alternative to UserVoice for customer feedback. (Demo, Source Codestars1.5k) MIT Go
  • Framadate - Online service for planning an appointment or make a decision quickly and easily: Make a poll, Define dates or subjects to choose, Send the poll link to your friends or colleagues, Discuss and make a decision. (Demo, Source Code) CECILL-B PHP

    • Proxy

  • http2-serverpush-proxystars26 - Reverse proxy that helps to automatically utilize HTTP/2.0's server push mechanism for static websites. Available as middleware and standalone application. MIT Nodejs
  • iodine - IPv4 over DNS tunnel solution, enabling you to start up a socks5 proxy listener. (Source Codestars3.7k) ISC C
  • PHP-Proxy - Web proxy script built specifically to be fast, easy to modify and to support video sites such as YouTube. (Demo, Source Codestars597) MIT PHP
  • Privoxy - Non-caching web proxy with advanced filtering capabilities for enhancing privacy, modifying web page data and HTTP headers, controlling access, and removing ads and other obnoxious Internet junk. GPL-2.0 C
  • Swiperproxy - Lightning-fast, open source web proxy that is easy for you to run and customize. (Source Codestars292) MIT Python

    • Search Engines

  • Searx - Privacy-respecting, hackable metasearch engine. (Demo, Source Codestars8.8k) AGPL-3.0 Python

    • Search Engines

    Project Management

  • Gitblit - Pure Java stack for managing, viewing, and serving Git repositories. (Source Codestars1.9k) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Gitea - Community managed fork of Gogs, lightweight code hosting solution. (Demo, Source Codestars24.7k) MIT Go
  • Gitlist - Web-based git repository browser - GitList allows you to browse repositories using your favorite browser, viewing files under different revisions, commit history and diffs. (Source Codestars2.8k) BSD-3-Clause PHP
  • Git WebUIstars753 - Standalone web based user interface for git repositories. Apache-2.0 Python
  • Gogs - Painless self-hosted Git Service written in Go. (Demo, Source Codestars37k) MIT Go
  • Phproject - High performance full-featured project management system. (Demo, Source Codestars325) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • Search Engines

    Documentation Generators

  • Flatdoc - Small Javascript file that fetches Markdown files and renders them as full pages. MIT Javascript

    • Task management/To-do lists

  • Kanboard - Simple and open source visual task board. (Source Codestars5.9k) MIT PHP
  • PHP Task/Todo liststars14 - Simple task/todo list that uses a JSON text file for the tasks. MIT PHP
  • Tracks - Web-based application to help you implement David Allen’s Getting Things Done™ methodology. (Source Codestars1k) GPL-2.0 Ruby

    • Ticketing

  • Bumpy Booby - Simple, responsive and highly customizable PHP bug tracking system. (Source Codestars25) MIT PHP
  • Zammad - Easy to use but powerful open-source support and ticketing system. (Source Codestars2.6k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

    • URL Shorteners

  • Polr - Modern, minimalist, modular, and lightweight URL shortener. (Source Codestars3.8k) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Wikis

  • Dokuwiki - Easy to use, lightweight, standards-compliant wiki engine with a simple syntax allowing reading the data outside the wiki. All data is stored in plain files, therefore no database is required. (Source Codestars3.1k) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Gititstars1.9k - Wiki program that stores pages and uploaded files in a git repository, which can then be modified using the VCS command line tools or the wiki's web interface. GPL-2.0 Haskell
  • Gollumstars11.4k - Simple, Git-powered wiki with a sweet API and local frontend. MIT Ruby
  • WiKiss - Wiki, simple to use and install. (Source Code) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • XWiki - Second generation wiki that allows the user to extend its functionalities with a powerful extension-based architecture. (Demo, Source Codestars618) LGPL-2.1 Java

    • Self-hosting Solutions

  • sovereignstars10k - Set of Ansible playbooks to build and maintain your own private cloud: email, calendar, contacts, file sync, IRC bouncer, VPN, and more. GPL-3.0 YAML/Other
  • YunoHost - Server operating system aiming to make self-hosting accessible to everyone. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Python/Other

    • External links

  • Awesome Big Datastars10.1k - Curated list of awesome big data frameworks, resources and other awesomeness.

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted Dec 25th - Dec 31st, 2017
item.description:
Calendaring and Contacts Management

Mail Delivery Agents

  • Dovecot - IMAP and POP3 server written primarily with security in mind. (Source Codestars559) MIT/LGPL-2.1 C

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    Social Networks and Forums

  • twister - Fully decentralized P2P microblogging platform leveraging the free software implementations of Bitcoin and BitTorrent protocols. (Source Codestars1.4k) MIT C++
  • flaskbb - FlaskBB is forum software written in Python using the microframework Flask. You can easily create new topics, posts and send other users private messages. It also includes basic administration and moderation tools. (Source Codestars2k) BSD-3-Clause Python
  • Buddycloud - Tools, libraries, services and a community to build user-to-user, group and social messaging into your app. Saves time. Scales up. Supports you. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java
  • cartularystars167 - RSS reader, readability tool, article archiver, microblogger, social graph manager and reading list manager. CDDL-1.0 PHP
  • diaspora* - Distributed social networking server. (Demo, Source Codestars12.7k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
  • Discourse - Advanced forum / community solution based on Ruby and JS. (Demo, Source Codestars33.3k) GPL-2.0 Ruby
  • FluxBB - Fast, light, user-friendly forum software for your website. (Source Codestars440) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Loomio - Loomio is a collaborative decision-making tool that makes it easy for anyone to participate in decisions which affect them. (Source Codestars2.1k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
  • Mastodon - Federated microblogging server, an alternative to GNU social. (Source Codestars24.2k) AGPL-3.0 Ruby
  • MyBB - Free, extensible forum software package. (Source Codestars762) LGPL-3.0 PHP
  • NodeBB - Node.js based forum software built for the modern web. (Source Codestars11.9k) GPL-3.0 Nodejs
  • OSSN - Open Source Social Network (OSSN) is a social networking software written in PHP. It allows you to make a social networking website and helps your members build social relationships, with people who share similar professional or personal interests. (Source Codestars729) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • phpBB - Flat-forum bulletin board software solution that can be used to stay in touch with a group of people or can power your entire website. (Source Codestars1.4k) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Pump.io - Stream server that does most of what people really want from a social network. (Source Codestars2k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs
  • Vanilla Forums - Simple and flexible forum software. (Source Codestars2.3k) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Flarum - Delightfully simple forums. Flarum is the next-generation forum software that makes online discussion fun again. (Source Codestars11.5k) MIT PHP

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

    E-commerce

  • Thelia - Thelia is an open source and flexible e-commerce solution. (Demo, Source Codestars758) LGPL-3.0 PHP
  • Saleor - Django based open-sourced e-commerce storefront. (Demo, Source Codestars11k) BSD-3-Clause Python
  • CoreShop - CoreShop is a e-commerce plugin for Pimcore. (Source Codestars196) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Drupal Commerce - Drupal Commerce is a popular e-commerce module for Drupal CMS, with support for dozens of payment, shipping, and shopping related modules. (Source Codestars356) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Magento - Leading provider of open omnichannel innovation. (Demo, Source Codestars9.4k) OSL-3.0 PHP
  • Microweber - Drag and Drop CMS and online shop. (Demo, Source Codestars2k) Apache-2.0 PHP
  • OpenCart - Free open source shopping cart solution. (Source Codestars6.1k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • OXID eShop - OXID eShop is a flexible open source e-commerce software with a wide range of functionalities. (Demo, Source Codestars195) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • PrestaShop - PrestaShop offers a free, open-source and fully scalable e-commerce solution. (Demo, Source Codestars5.9k) OSL-3.0 PHP
  • Pretix - Django based ticket sales platform for events. (Source Code) Apache-2.0 Python
  • Sylius - Symfony2 powered open source full-stack platform for eCommerce. (Demo, Source Codestars6.3k) MIT PHP

    • Feed Readers

    Peer-to-peer filesharing

  • Magneticostars2.5k - Magnetico is the first autonomous (self-hosted) BitTorrent DHT search engine suite that is designed for end-users. AGPL-3.0 Python
  • Dat Project - Powerful decentralized file sharing applications built from a large ecosystem of modules. (Source Code) MIT Nodejs
  • instant.iostars2.8k - Streaming file transfer over WebTorrent. (Demo) MIT Nodejs
  • Magnetissimostars2.5k - Search engine that indexes all popular torrent sites. MIT Elixir
  • Opentracker - Open and free bittorrent tracker. It aims for minimal resource usage and is intended to run at your wlan router. (Source Code) Beerware C
  • peerflix-serverstars1.2k - Downloads torrent files and provides a direct link download or a direct link stream. MIT Nodejs
  • rartrackerstars174 - Complete private bittorrent tracker. WTFPL PHP

    • Groupware

  • Kolab - Kolab community is a unified communication and collaboration system. (Source Code) GPL-2.0/LGPL-2.1/GPL-3.0 C++/Python/PHP
  • SOGo - SOGo offers multiple ways to access the calendaring and messaging data. CalDAV, CardDAV, GroupDAV, as well as ActiveSync, including native Outlook compatibility and Web interface. (Demo, Source Codestars1.1k) LGPL-2.1 Objective-C
  • Zimbra Collaboration - Email, calendar, collaboration server with Web interface and lots of integrations. (Source Code) GPL-2.0/CPAL-1.0 Java
  • Citadel - Groupware including email, calendar/scheduling, address books, forums, mailing lists, IM, wiki and blog engines, RSS aggregation and more. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 C
  • egroupware - Software suite including calendars, address books, notepad, project management tools, client relationship management tools (CRM), knowledge management tools, a wiki and a CMS. (Source Codestars137) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Horde - The Horde Project is about creating high quality Open Source applications and libraries, based on PHP and the Horde Framework. (Demo, Source Codestars247) GPL-2.0 PHP
  • Kopano - Groupware suite including e-mail, calendars, tasks, todos and notes. Featuring a modern WebApp, DeskApp and mobile access over Z-Push/ActiveSync. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0 C/Python/PHP
  • Tine 2.0 - Contacts, Calendar, Tasks, WebDAV, ActiveSync, VOIP, Mail-Client, CRM, Sales, Projects, Timetracker. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0/Other PHP

    • URL Shorteners

  • Link-shortener-botstars3 ⚠ - URL shortener using a Telegram Bot. (Demo) MIT Ruby
  • Lstustars157 - Let's SHorten That Url - Lightweight URL shortener. WTFPL Perl
  • shorturlstars76 - Simple URL shortener with very tiny URLs. (Demo) MIT Go
  • url-shortenerstars154 ⚠ - Shitty url shortener, emoji and AI powered. MIT Nodejs

    • Self-hosting Solutions

  • Syncloud - Your own online file storage, social network or email server. (Source Codestars263) GPL-3.0 Python/Other
  • DietPi - Minimal Debian OS optimized for single-board computers, which allows you to easily install and manage several services for selfhosting at home. (Source Codestars2.5k) GPL-2.0 Shell
  • OpenMediaVault - OpenMediaVault is the next generation network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux. It contains services like SSH, (S)FTP, SMB/CIFS, DAAP media server, RSync, BitTorrent client and many more. (Source Codestars2.3k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • Sandstorm - Personal server for running self-hosted apps easily and securely. (Demo, Source Codestars5.8k) Apache-2.0 C++/Other

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    CalDAV or CardDAV servers

  • Baïkal - Lightweight CalDAV and CardDAV server based on sabre/dav. (Source Codestars1.8k) GPL-3.0 PHP
  • CalendarServer - Apple, Inc.'s standards-compliant server implementing the CalDAV and CardDAV protocols shipped with macOS Server. (Source Codestars390) Apache-2.0 Python
  • calypso - Python-based CalDAV and CardDAV server, forked from Radicale. (Source Code) GPL-3.0 Python
  • Radicale - Simple calendar and contact server with extremely low administrative overhead. (Source Codestars2.1k) GPL-3.0 Python
  • SabreDAV - Open source CardDAV, CalDAV, and WebDAV framework and server. (Source Codestars1.1k) MIT PHP

    • Automation

  • Healthchecks - Django app which listens for pings and sends alerts when pings are late. (Source Codestars3.8k) BSD-3-Clause Python
  • Medusastars1.3k - Automatic Video Library Manager for TV Shows. It watches for new episodes of your favorite shows, and when they are posted it does its magic. GPL-3.0 Python
  • pyLoad - Lightweight, customizable and remotely manageable downloader for 1-click-hosting sites like rapidshare.com or uploaded.to. (Source Codestars2.2k) GPL-3.0 Python
  • Radarr - Radarr is an independent fork of Sonarr reworked for automatically downloading movies via Usenet and BitTorrent, à la Couchpotato. (Source Codestars5.1k) GPL-3.0 C#
  • AmIUnique - Learn how identifiable you are on the Internet (browser fingerprinting tool). (Source Codestars590) MIT Java
  • WebUI-aria2stars8.2k - Interface to interact with the aria2 downloader. Very simple to use, just download and open index.html in any web browser. (Demo) MIT HTML5
  • Zenbot 3stars7.6k - Zenbot is a lightweight, extendable, artificially intelligent trading bot for Bitcoin, Ether, Litecoin, and more. MIT Node.js

    • Bookmarks and Link Sharing

  • Pinry - The tiling image board system for people who want to save, tag, and share images, videos, and webpages. (Source Codestars1.7k) BSD-2-Clause Python
  • dyu/bookmarksstars116 - Single-threaded/process bookmark app powered by leveldb and uWebSockets. Supports importing from Delicious and Chrome. (Demo) Apache-2.0 Java
  • No Fuss Bookmarks - Very simple software and service to store bookmarks especially designed for hackers (that don't need fancy interfaces, but nice API). (Source Codestars108) GPL-3.0 Python
  • golinksstars273 - Web application that allows you to create smart bookmarks, commands and aliases by pointing your web browser's default search engine at a running instance. Similar to bunny1 or yubnub. (Demo) MIT Go
  • Shaarlistars2.2k - Personal, minimalist, super-fast, no-database bookmarking and link sharing platform. (Demo) Zlib PHP

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    IRC

  • Robust IRC - RobustIRC is IRC without netsplits. Distributed IRC server, based on RobustSession protocol. (Source Codestars141) BSD-3-Clause Go
  • Quassel IRC - distributed IRC client, meaning that one (or multiple) client(s) can attach to and detach from a central core. (Source Codestars598) GPL-2.0 C++

    • DNS

  • nsupdate.info - nsupdate.info is a dynamic DNS service. (Demo, Source Codestars740) BSD-3-Clause Python
  • CoreDNS - Plugin driven DNS Server with support for proxying to Google's DNS-over-HTTPS. (Source Codestars7.6k) Apache-2.0 Go

    • Feed Readers

  • FeedHQ - FeedHQ is a web-based feed reader. (Source Codestars530) BSD-3-Clause Python
  • CommaFeed - Google Reader inspired self-hosted RSS reader. (Source Codestars1.8k) Apache-2.0 Java
  • Leselysstars227 - Your very elegant RSS reader. AGPL-3.0 Python
  • NewsBlur - NewsBlur is a personal news reader that brings people together to talk about the world. A new sound of an old instrument. (Source Codestars5.7k) MIT Python
  • RSS Monsterstars326 - RSS Monster is an easy to use web-based RSS aggregator and reader compatible with the Fever API, created as an alternative for Google Reader. MIT PHP

    • Search Engines

    Documentation Generators

  • Docstore - Static document hosting without any server-side processing, does not require you to recompile every time you change an article. Clone the repository and add articles in the text/ directory to get started. (Source Codestars116) BSD-3-Clause Javascript
  • markdown-treestars93 - Serve a hierarchy / tree directory of markdown files. Use intended for small sites built in markdown. MIT Ruby
  • Read the Docs - Host documentation, making it fully searchable and easy to find; import your docs using any major version control system, including Mercurial, Git, Subversion, and Bazaar. (Demo, Source Codestars6.5k) MIT Python

    • Maps and Global Positioning System (GPS)

  • Orionstars159 - Powerful OwnTracks API-compliant location data visualization frontend for the web. (Demo) MIT Python/Nodejs
  • OpenGTS - Entry-level fleet tracking system. Supports variety of tracking devices and protocols. Comes with rich web-interface and reporting features. (Demo, Source Code) Apache-2.0 Java
